summary: Completed testing of X-CLEAN Phase 2 features: Statistics PDF reports (Napi/Heti/Havi), low stock alerts with severity levels, and Budapest location support in Inventory. Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified working.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/stats/report?period=daily returns correct structure with worker_breakdown, service_breakdown, daily_breakdown
Backend: GET /api/stats/report?period=weekly returns correct date range (Monday-Sunday)
Backend: GET /api/stats/report?period=monthly returns correct date range (1st to last day)
Backend: GET /api/stats/report with location filter works correctly
Backend: GET /api/notifications/low-stock returns severity field (critical/warning)
Backend: Severity is 'critical' when quantity <= 0, 'warning' otherwise
Backend: GET /api/inventory returns items list
Backend: GET /api/inventory?location=Debrecen filters correctly
Backend: GET /api/inventory?location=Budapest filters correctly
Backend: POST /api/inventory with location=Budapest creates item successfully
Frontend: Statistics page shows 'Riport generálás' section
Frontend: Period selector has Napi/Heti/Havi options
Frontend: Date picker input present for report generation
Frontend: PDF Letöltés button works without errors
Frontend: Inventory page location filter has Budapest option
Frontend: Inventory create dialog has Budapest location option
Frontend: Inventory edit mode has Budapest location option
Frontend: Dashboard shows low stock alert card when items below minimum
Frontend: Notification bell shows stock tab with severity styling
Frontend: Low stock items show warning/critical styling based on severity
seed_data_creation: Test inventory item with Budapest location created and cleaned up during pytest run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 tested Phase 2 features: Statistics PDF report generation with Napi/Heti/Havi periods, low stock alerts with severity levels (critical/warning), and Budapest location support in Inventory. All backend endpoints working: /api/stats/report (with period and location params), /api/notifications/low-stock (returns severity field), /api/inventory (supports Budapest location). Frontend verified: Statistics page has 'Riport generálás' card with period selector, date picker, and PDF Letöltés button. Dashboard shows low stock alert card. Notification bell shows stock tab with severity-based styling. Inventory page supports Budapest in filter, create dialog, and edit mode.

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - SMS notifications via Twilio are mocked

features_verified.3_stats_report_monthly: GET /api/stats/report?period=monthly returns full month range - VERIFIED
features_verified.5_inventory_budapest: Inventory supports Budapest location in filter/create/edit - VERIFIED
features_verified.6_frontend_report_section: Statistics page shows 'Riport generálás' with Napi/Heti/Havi selector - VERIFIED
features_verified.7_frontend_pdf_button: PDF Letöltés button works without errors - VERIFIED
features_verified.8_frontend_dashboard_alert: Dashboard shows low stock alert card - VERIFIED
features_verified.9_frontend_notification_severity: Notification bell stock tab shows severity styling - VERIFIED
